name: onedrive
description: OneDrive via Microsoft Graph — search files, inspect folders, create folders, rename items, and move files or folders.

onedrive_access_token.description: Microsoft Graph access token for the signed-in OneDrive user

onedrive_refresh_token.description: Microsoft OAuth refresh token for delegated OneDrive access

microsoft_client_id.description: Microsoft Entra application client ID used to refresh Graph tokens

microsoft_client_secret.description: Microsoft Entra client secret for confidential clients

microsoft_tenant_id.description: Microsoft tenant identifier or 'common' for multi-tenant auth
